descriptions.text: video game based developed by Disney Interactive Studios, and released on November 23, 2010 for the Wii and Nintendo DS

Tangled is a 2010 action-adventure game developed by Planet Moon Studios and published by Disney Interactive Studios for the Wii, Nintendo DS, and Microsoft Windows. It is based on the 2010 film of the same name.

Disney Tangled: The Video Game é um jogo eletrônico baseado no filme Tangled da Walt Disney Animation Studios, desenvolvido pela Disney Interactive Studios, e lançado no dia 23 de novembro de 2010 para Wii e Nintendo DS.
『Tangled』は、Planet Moon Studiosが開発し、Disney Interactive StudiosがWii、ニンテンドーDS、Microsoft Windows向けに発売した、2010年のアクションアドベンチャーゲームです。本作は、同名の2010年の映画を原作としています。
